entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: The crop species being studied for disease forecasting.

entities.description: A disease affecting pigeonpea caused by a virus.

entities.name: DYNAMIC BAYESIAN NETWORK
entities.description: A machine learning model used to forecast the spread of Sterility Mosaic Disease.

entities.name: HIGH-THROUGHPUT PHENOTYPING
entities.description: A method integrated with machine learning to efficiently forecast disease.

entities.name: MACHINE LEARNING MODELS
entities.description: General computational models used for forecasting disease spread.

entities.name: VIRUS
entities.description: The biological agent responsible for Sterility Mosaic Disease.

entities.name: EM ALGORITHM
entities.description: An algorithm used to learn parameters for the modules of the Dynamic Bayesian Network.

entities.name: 3D POINT CLOUD TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: A high-throughput scanning platform used to collect physiological data.

entities.name: PHYSIOLOGICAL DATA
entities.description: Biological measurements collected from the crop using 3D point cloud technology.

entities.description: Weather-related data recorded by a local weather station.

entities.description: The research site in Hyderabad, Telangana, India, where data was collected.
